case_title: MORAN TIMOTHY JOHN VS LINCOLN MERCURY OF SERRAMONTE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORAN TIMOTHY JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINCOLN MERCURY OF SERRAMONTE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF JUL-29-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LINCOLN MERCURY OF SERRAMONTE HEARING SET FOR OCT-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORAN TIMOTHY JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LINCOLN MERCURY OF SERRAMONTE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MORAN TIMOTHY JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT LINCOLN MERCURY OF SERRAMONTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-18-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-31-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LINCOLN MERCURY OF SERRAMONTE
CERTIFIED MAIL TO MEHRAN IMANABADI RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
